AssessRecipeComponent.labelLong: Click here to assess the recipe on this page
AssessRecipeComponent.notTheAssessedPage: The displayed information is not about this page!

HelpComponent.title: Responsible Cooking Alliance
HelpComponent.welcome1: Welcome to the Responsible Cooking Alliance plugin, a tool that assists you to create healthier and more sustainable recipes.
HelpComponent.welcome2: Navigate to a web page containing a recipe in text (not sound, image or video!) and follow the instructions below.
HelpComponent.paragraph1: Press the button above to assess the recipe in the current page.
HelpComponent.paragraph2: The assessment takes place in two steps: (1) extract the recipe from the page and (2) suggest alternative, healthier and/or more sustainable ingredients. The application displays the list of ingredients in the top half of the page and the suggestions in the bottom half.
HelpComponent.paragraph3: When browsing suggestions, you have three options:
HelpComponent.paragraph4: Press an activated button ("Accept" or "Reject") again to switch a suggestion to undecided.
HelpComponent.paragraph5: Another way to switch a suggestion to undecided is to click the "minus" button of a replaced ingredient in the recipe in the top half of the page.
HelpComponent.loginParagraph1: Press the login button to login or register. A new tab will open in your browser (not in the area of the plugin), where you can complete this process.
